untranslatable_reason: The Deliberation pattern requires identification of a specific 3-bar candlestick formation (body shapes, wick patterns, and relative positioning) which cannot be expressed using only price-based indicators and mathematical operators. The pattern identification requires visual/structural analysis of candlestick morphology across multiple bars. Additionally, the 'three-day pattern high' is not available as a computable indicator — it would require custom pattern detection logic. Context-dependent direction (continuation vs. reversal) also requires regime detection beyond the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the core breakout logic (close above prior high) but this loses the essential pattern recognition component. A proper implementation would require: (1) custom candlestick pattern detector, (2) multi-bar formation validation logic, and (3) trend context analysis. The signal as described is a visual pattern that cannot be reduced to mathematical conditions on individual price bars.
